use_cases: Display loading states during async operations
Indicate processing in progress for any UI action
Show pending states in forms or data fetching
Provide visual feedback during page transitions
Use as a placeholder while content loads
ai_summary: A morphing loading spinner that smoothly transitions between different shapes and rotates continuously. The animation creates a fluid morphing effect by combining scale, rotation, and border-radius changes. Configurable with sm/md/lg size options, making it suitable for any application needing visual loading feedback.
